arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher picks who truly has the greater achievements out of Sir Alex Ferguson or Pep Guardiola
Alphonso Davies: Man Utd and Real Madrid’s transfer prospects as shock suitor revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been long-time leaders in seeking to sign Davies as a free agent to solve a long-standing issue at left-back, but lately Man Utd have emerged as a serious threat while Bayern Munich’s hopes of renewing his deal have been boosted. Alphonso Davies ’ future is becoming clearer, with major updates on the transfer rumours linking him to both Manchester United and Real Madrid, who are hopeful of prising him away from Bayern Munich as a free agent in the summer.
